creator: ohartman@klima.physik.uni-mainz.de
text:
On Wed, 26 Dec 2001, Alan Eldridge wrote:

Problem solved, I'm so sorry.
I watched some threads in -current (mailing list) and found out that I
switched ON on both systems the same time vfs_ioopt to ON when changing
to cdrtools 1.10_1 (or a day later). This option in the FreeBSD UNIX kernel
is said to be broken (M. Dillon) and so it causes problems with cdrecord
(and these problems were reported with -current). I switched this option
off now and all things works as expected!

:>On Wed, Dec 26, 2001 at 04:28:59PM +0100, O. Hartmann wrote:
:>
:>>Well, the cd recorder seems both to be all right and it is really unlikely that they
:>>died the same time, the same hour, the same minute!
:>>It seems to me that cdrtools did some major changes in the drivers, so our older CD-R
:>>aren't supported now.
:>
:>There were no major changes in 1.10. I'm reasonably familiar with the
:>application; I'll see if I can come up with a few more suggestions to help
:>diagnose why it is failing on your systems.
:>
:>--
:>Alan Eldridge
:>Pmmfmffmmfmp mmmpppppffmpmfpmpppff $PffMmmPppMpmPpfPpm mfpmmmmmfpmpmpppff.
:>

--
MfG
O. Hartmann
